overall.description: First-person gameplay footage depicting a character navigating a dark, foggy marsh at night. The player raises a lit torch midway through the clip to illuminate the path through tall reeds and murky water.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark foggy marsh trail with tall reeds

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through the dark marsh, surrounded by tall grass and thick fog

entered.detail: tall brown reeds and marsh grass lining the narrow path
dark stagnant water visible through gaps in the vegetation and fog
leafless scrub trees silhouetted against the dark foggy sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view navigating through a narrow, foggy marsh path at night. Tall reeds surround the path while dark water is visible in the distance. The scene is extremely dark with minimal ambient light, creating an atmosphere of cautious exploration through the dense wetland vegetation.

events.description: character raises a lit wooden torch, casting warm orange light that illuminates the immediate surroundings

agents.ego_description: holding a wooden torch aloft while continuing through the marsh, revealing fence posts and dense vegetation ahead

entered.detail: lit wooden torch held in right hand, casting flickering orange light on the grass and reeds
vertical wooden posts emerging from the marsh grass, possibly marking a boundary

segments.scene_description: The character raises a lit torch at the start of this segment, dramatically changing the lighting as warm orange light illuminates the marsh path. The torch reveals wooden fence posts in the distance and highlights the texture of the tall reeds. The camera continues moving forward through the foggy wetland, with the torch providing the primary light source against the dark night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark, foggy marsh that transforms from a state of near-total blindness into a warm, torch-lit exploration. It begins by navigating a narrow path shrouded in night, where tall reeds flank the way and dark water looms in the distance under minimal ambient light. As the camera pushes forward through the dense wetland vegetation, a lit torch is raised, dramatically shifting the atmosphere as warm orange light cuts through the gloom. This illumination reveals the textures of the surrounding reeds and brings distant wooden fence posts into view, with the torch becoming the primary light source against the persistent fog. The scene finally settles into a steady advance through the murky landscape, guided by the flickering glow of the flame.
